DashboardOverview.subtitle: Here's what's happening with your projects today.

DashboardContract.title: Contract Management
DashboardContract.subtitle: Review, sign, and manage your project agreements.
DashboardContract.legalNoticeText: This document is protected by advanced encryption. All modifications are logged and audited to ensure legal compliance.

intro.title: 1. PARTIES
intro.content: This agreement is entered into between Shalom Developer (the 'Service Provider') and the Client as specified in the Dashboard profile.

scope.title: 2. SCOPE OF WORK
scope.content: The Service Provider agrees to deliver the following elite digital assets within the agreed timeline:

payment.title: 3. PAYMENT TERMS
payment.content: Payment is due upon the first presentation of project deliverables. Equity options are available as defined in the primary contract addendum.

Privacy.title: Privacy Policy
Privacy.description: Your privacy is paramount. Discover how we protect your data and project integrity throughout our collaboration.

data.title: Data Protection
data.content1: We take the security of your project data and personal information seriously. All communication and project assets shared during the contract period are handled with strict confidentiality.
data.content2: We do not share your project details, intellectual property, or personal contact information with third parties without your explicit written consent.

transparency.title: Project Transparency
transparency.content1: As part of our commitment to quality, we conduct regular audits of projects we develop during the first 6 months. This is to ensure long-term stability and security standards are maintained.
transparency.content2: You have full visibility into the development process through our client dashboard, where you can monitor progress and access project milestones.

contract.title: Contractual Privacy
contract.content1: Our signed contracts include comprehensive Non-Disclosure Agreement (NDA) clauses to protect your business interests. This extends to all code, designs, and strategic advice provided during the term of the agreement.

Terms.title: Terms & Conditions
Terms.description: Clarity and commitment are the foundations of elite partnership. These terms outline our professional service agreement.

engagement.title: 1. Project Engagement
engagement.content1: All projects commence with a formal signed contract. This document defines the project scope, detailed specifications, and an allocated time agreement for delivery.
engagement.content2: We commit to delivering the initial project template within 5 business days from the contract signing date, allowing for early feedback and iterative development.

payment.title: 2. Payment & Equity Options
payment.content1: Payment is due upon the first presentation of the project deliverables. This ensures that the client is satisfied with the direction and foundation of the build.
payment.content2: In cases where liquid capital is not immediate, we offer a Strategic Equity Option. Clients may choose to grant shares/equity in the project as a form of payment, subject to a separate valuation and partnership agreement.

maintenance.title: 3. Post-Launch Maintenance
maintenance.content1: We provide 6 months of complimentary maintenance for every project we build. This includes critical bug fixes, performance monitoring, and regular system audits to ensure continued excellence.

hosting.title: 4. Hosting Infrastructure
hosting.content1: Clients have the absolute freedom to choose their hosting provider. We offer premium managed hosting services for an additional fee, or we can assist in deploying the project to the client's own infrastructure.

footer.agreement: By engaging in our services, you agree to the above terms. These terms are governed by the specific project contract signed at commencement.
